success_surface: Running total calculation with variable deposits and efficiency rates across multiple rows
effective_behaviors: Dynamic column discovery by iterating headers rather than hardcoding column indices
Stateful accumulation maintaining previous row values for running calculations
File integrity preserved via copy before modification
Empty/NaN value handling with carry-forward logic
Row-by-row iteration from data start to maximum row end
Exception handling during individual row processing
Post-write verification by reading back generated file
evidence: Used loop to find 'Total ability' column index dynamically via header comparison
Maintained prev_total variable to track accumulated wealth across iterations
Applied shutil.copy to preserve original workbook before editing
Checked pd.isna() for deposit/efficiency values and carried forward prev_total when empty
Iterated range(2, ws.max_row + 1) for dynamic range coverage
Wrapped row processing in try-except to handle exceptions gracefully
Read back file with pd.read_excel for final verification output

memory_items.title: Dynamic Column Resolution
memory_items.lesson: Always discover target columns programmatically by scanning header values rather than assuming fixed positions.
memory_items.generalization: When a column name is specified in instructions but position may vary, iterate through the header row to locate the correct column index before writing.

memory_items.title: Stateful Row Processing
memory_items.lesson: For calculations dependent on prior row values, maintain state variables that persist across iterations.
memory_items.generalization: When implementing running totals, cumulative sums, or chained dependencies, store intermediate results in persistent variables updated each iteration.

memory_items.title: Missing Data Inheritance
memory_items.lesson: Empty or NaN cells in subsequent rows should inherit the last valid calculated value unless new input requires recalculation.
memory_items.generalization: When processing rows beyond populated data, detect empty fields and apply appropriate fallback logic (carry-forward, skip, or default value).

memory_items.title: Verification Loop
memory_items.lesson: After writing data, always read back and validate key outputs match expectations.
memory_items.generalization: Include a read-back verification step using both the editing library and an alternative parser to confirm data integrity post-modification.

memory_items.title: File Safety Protocol
memory_items.lesson: Original files must never be overwritten; always create output copies first.
memory_items.generalization: Begin all file operations by creating a copy at the output path before applying any modifications.

edits.content:
## 6. Trace-Derived Lessons
- **Dynamic Column Resolution**: Always discover target columns programmatically by scanning header values rather than assuming fixed positions.
- **Stateful Row Processing**: For calculations dependent on prior row values, maintain state variables that persist across iterations.
- **Missing Data Inheritance**: Empty or NaN cells in subsequent rows should inherit the last valid calculated value unless new input requires recalculation.
- **Verification Loop**: After writing data, always read back and validate key outputs match expectations using at least two methods.
- **File Safety Protocol**: Original files must never be overwritten; always create output copies before applying modifications.
